etymology.description: 𠨍 is a variant form of 卯(卯) (mǎo, "4th earthly branch") depicting the fourth stage in the Chinese zodiac related to the rabbit hour, but specifically featuring two people facing each other.
etymology.interpretation: The character 𠨍 as a variant form reflects an alternative depiction of the concept associated with the 4th earthly branch in the Chinese zodiac, illustrating a social interaction through the imagery of two people facing each other.
